---
listing:
  - id: lectures-listing
    type: table
    fields: [title]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    field-display-names: 
      title: "Lectures"
    contents:
      - ../lectures/convergence/convergence_1.qmd
      - ../lectures/optimization/index.qmd
      - ../lectures/convergence/convergence_2.qmd
      - ../lectures/discrete_dynamic_programming.qmd
      - ../lectures/perturbation/index.qmd
      - ../lectures/discretization/index.qmd
      - ../lectures/interpolation/index.qmd
      - ../lectures/time_iteration/index.qmd
      - ../lectures/heterogenous_agents/index.qmd
      - ../lectures/deterministic_simulation/index.qmd
  - id: tutorials-listing
    type: table
    fields: [title]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    field-display-names: 
      title: "Tutorials"
    contents:
      - ../tutorials/Julia_Basics.qmd
      - ../tutorials/solow.qmd
      - ../tutorials/epidemiology.qmd
      - ../tutorials/optimization.qmd
      - ../tutorials/perturbation.qmd
      - ../tutorials/monte_carlo_interpolation.qmd
      - ../tutorials/time_iteration.qmd
      - ../tutorials/heterogenous_agents_dolo.qmd
      - ../tutorials/deterministic_simulation.qmd
  - id: exercises-listing
    type: table
    fields: [title]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    field-display-names: 
      title: "Exercises"
    contents:
      - ../exercises/optimization_pushups.qmd
---


::: {.callout-tip title="Installing Julia" collapse="true"}

This assumes that you don't have any version of Julia on your computer. If you have one, please consult with a higher authority.

To get a very nice working installation:

- install [JuliaUp](https://github.com/JuliaLang/juliaup): keep Julia versions up to date
- install [VSCode](https://code.visualstudio.com/)
- inside VSCode, install the Julia extension

:::



::: {.callout-important title="Homework" collapse="false"}

For April 24th (first homework)

- [Deep learning](homework/coursework_1_deeplearning.ipynb)

For May 24th (second homework)

- [Consumption Saving](homework/coursework_2.qmd)


:::
